title: kephalaioo #2775
definition:
1) to bring under headings, to sum up, to summarise
 2) to smite or wound in the head, to smite on the cheek
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to bring under headings, to sum up, to summarise
 2) to smite or wound in the head, to smite on the cheek

    NASB:  to strike on the head:
